text: await is not parallelism. Isolate.run for one-shot CPU work, Isolate.spawn for warm workers. On web, neither runs.
MAUI 11 drag-and-drop in one line: DataPackage.Properties is process-local. Set e.Data.Text too if the drop crosses apps.
MAUI dark mode that actually flips: AppThemeBinding plus ConfigChanges.UiMode on MainActivity. Without the flag, Android only switches once.
Cursor just shipped a TypeScript SDK. Same Composer agent as the editor, runs against your cwd or a sandboxed cloud VM.
MAUI to the Microsoft Store: dotnet publish per arch, MakeAppx bundle, zip as .msixupload. The VS wizard still won't.
byte[] to ReadOnlyMemory<byte> in .NET 11: implicit cast for the full array, AsMemory(start, length) for a slice.
One Flutter repo, many SDK versions in CI: .fvmrc as truth, a fail-fast:false matrix on subosito/flutter-action v2.
Claude Code 2.1.128: --plugin-dir takes .zip archives, EnterWorktree branches from local HEAD, OTEL_* no longer leaks to subprocesses.
GetConnectionString returns null in .NET 11? Usually appsettings.json key missing or not copied to bin, not your code.
Expose EF Core to a coding agent via MCP, not a RunQuery(sql) tool. IDbContextFactory, AsNoTracking, gated writes.
Skip the federated plugin scaffold. A MethodChannel plus 20 lines in MainActivity / AppDelegate is the whole bridge.
Agent Framework 1.0: wrap an AIFunction in ApprovalRequiredAIFunction and the agent pauses for a human first.
